title: Inventory returns 503 to order service

observations.content: upstream inventory failure: inventory returned 503 for reserve request
order span failed at inventory dependency

title: Inventory connection refusal

observations.content: upstream inventory failure caused by connection refused
gateway error ratio increased

title: Inventory failure with misleading latency signal

observations.content: inventory returned 503 during checkout
inventory p95 indicates slow downstream calls

title: Inventory latency exceeds client deadline

observations.content: inventory p95 is 4.8 seconds showing a slow downstream
request deadline exceeded while reserving stock

title: Slow inventory span

observations.content: slow downstream inventory span ended with deadline exceeded
check dependency latency before restarting

title: Inventory latency with incomplete telemetry

observations.content: inventory span duration is abnormal but duration buckets are missing
client request timed out without downstream error detail

title: Database connection pool exhausted

observations.content: connection pool exhausted: timeout acquiring connection
active connections at limit for five minutes

title: Pool exhaustion after a deployment

observations.content: connection pool exhausted on write path
error rate after deployment; rollback restored the old release

title: Pool active connections at hard limit

observations.content: active connections at limit and timeout acquiring connection
order write failed waiting for database

title: Cache stampede overloads database

observations.content: cache miss rate reached 96 percent with database qps spike
redis evictions increased after key expiry

title: Redis eviction cascade

observations.content: redis evictions and cache miss rate rose together
database qps spike indicates stampede recovery procedure

title: Cache stampede with missing Redis metrics

observations.content: cache effectiveness changed abruptly but Redis exporter is unavailable
database traffic rose without a matching user traffic increase

title: New release increases error rate

observations.content: error rate after deployment v2.4 increased immediately
rollback restored service in the previous incident

title: New version introduces validation regression

observations.content: new version regression appeared in validation span
error rate after deployment aligns with release timestamp

title: Deployment incident with memory noise

observations.content: error rate after deployment increased
worker was oomkilled after out of memory condition

title: Worker memory leak

observations.content: process rss grows continuously until out of memory
container was oomkilled by the runtime

title: Repeated OOM restart loop

observations.content: container oomkilled after out of memory
rss grows continuously between restarts

title: Memory leak with disk pressure noise

observations.content: rss grows continuously in inventory workers
no space left while disk usage above 95 percent

title: Cross-zone network partition

observations.content: packet loss reached 70 percent and host unreachable errors rose
connection reset across availability zones

title: Network resets between services

observations.content: connection reset and host unreachable on inventory span
packet loss isolated to one zone

title: Partition with unrelated TLS warning

observations.content: packet loss and host unreachable affect a subnet
one stale client logged x509 warning

title: Expired service certificate

observations.content: x509 certificate expired; tls handshake failed
secure upstream connection rejected certificate

title: TLS handshake fails after certificate expiry

observations.content: tls handshake failed because certificate expired
rotate x509 certificate and verify trust bundle

title: Certificate expiry while log backend is unavailable

observations.content: x509 certificate expired causing tls handshake failed
certificate expired

title: External API quota exhausted

observations.content: http 429: rate limit exceeded and quota exhausted
external dependency rejection count increased

title: Sustained 429 responses

observations.content: http 429 responses indicate quota exhausted
request quota increase after rate limit exceeded

title: Quota exhaustion with transient network loss

observations.content: rate limit exceeded and quota exhausted for tenant
brief packet loss recovered before incident

title: Service disk fills completely

observations.content: disk usage above 98 percent and io wait saturated
no space left while writing inventory journal

title: No space left errors

observations.content: no space left on device; disk usage above configured threshold
io wait saturated on one node

title: Disk saturation with memory pressure noise

observations.content: disk usage above 97 percent and io wait saturated
one worker approached memory limit without restart
